description_long: This hammer features a large, rectangular metallic head with intricate decorative engravings along its sides and a bold, black starburst emblem on the top face. The head is solid and robust, with flat striking surfaces on both ends, and the sides are adorned with ornate patterns that suggest a ceremonial or symbolic function in addition to practical use. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be wrapped or textured for improved grip, colored in a deep brown that contrasts with the silvery head. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with no visible fasteners, giving the hammer a unified and sturdy appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of legendary or fantasy hammers, with a focus on both aesthetics and functionality. No visible signs of wear, branding, or attachments are present, indicating a pristine and possibly decorative state.
description: A large, ornate hammer with a silver, engraved head and a straight brown handle, featuring a black starburst emblem on top. The design is robust and decorative, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the engraved silver head with a black starburst emblem on top and the straight brown handle below.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flat striking face and the ornate engravings along the side edges of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the engraved head and handle, with the starburst emblem still visible on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other flat striking face and the continuation of the ornate engravings.
attribute_handle_type: straight cylindrical wooden handle with a textured or wrapped grip, colored brown
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type metallic head with flat striking faces and ornate engravings, featuring a black starburst emblem on the top
